chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-852 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 04.09.2025 Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant Prosecutor General ************** None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. The SCNS Act has now been amended and a proviso for bail has been inserted; therefore, the petitioner is required to avail alternate remedy by approaching the concerned Court. In view of the above, the present Constitution Petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
